style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial architecture diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A large rounded box labelled NEXUS, GOOGLE CLOUD. Inside it, a box labelled DEVELOPER VM containing three small labelled panels: a dark TERMINAL panel showing several stacked windows each with a tiny robot icon, a small BROWSER panel, and a FILE SYSTEM tree. Several more small robot icons inside the VM labelled AGENTS suggest many running at once. A thin outer band around the large box is labelled SECURITY OVERLAY. On the right edge, a small locked gateway icon labelled PRIVATE VPN ENDPOINT, through which a small box labelled APP connects outward. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial architecture diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A large rounded box labelled NEXUS, GOOGLE CLOUD. Inside it, a box labelled DEVELOPER VM containing three small labelled panels: a dark TERMINAL panel showing several stacked windows each with a tiny robot icon, a small BROWSER panel, and a FILE SYSTEM tree. Several more small robot icons inside the VM labelled AGENTS suggest many running at once. A thin outer band around the large box is labelled SECURITY OVERLAY. On the right edge, a small locked gateway icon labelled PRIVATE VPN ENDPOINT, through which a small box labelled APP connects outward. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
